payload.answer: I won’t store instructions that attempt to override memory policy or require saving every future message as high confidence.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an instruction to override memory policy and store all future content; it is not a durable user fact or preference suitable for memory.

repair_options: Provide a specific durable fact, preference, or relationship you want remembered.
Avoid instructions that attempt to bypass memory filtering or force high-confidence storage.

raw_text: {"intent":"attempted_prompt_injection_memory_request","decision":"reject","memory_cards":[],"entity_resolution":{"action":"none","entity_id":null,"reason":"The input is an instruction to override memory policy and store all future content; it is not a durable user fact or preference suitable for memory."},"conflict_classification":"prompt_injection_policy_override_attempt","answer":"I won’t store instructions that attempt to override memory policy or require saving every future message as high confidence.","citations":[],"repair_options":["Provide a specific durable fact, preference, or relationship you want remembered.","Avoid instructions that attempt to bypass memory filtering or force high-confidence storage."],"receipt":{"success":false,"details":["Rejected prompt-injection style instruction.","No memory cards created."]}}
